docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SATOVSKY, JOEL H. AS TO DEFENDANT TALIAFERRO, ALVIN F. IND DBA PEACH TRADING COMPANY
